UserPlugin.Name: TaterFaderXGroup
UserPlugin.Note: ReadMe: https://github.com/LXTater/MA3TaterPlugins/upload/main/TaterFader/TaterFaderTricksXGroup/ TaterFaderXGroups - V0.1 NOTE: This is a first version, early release. It has not be fully tested. Please test before operating in a show environment. 1 - Run Plugin 2 - Set the Settings Choose an Empty Executor High Value: The highest value that you want XGroup to be (Fader 100%) Low Value: The Lowest Value that you want XGroup to be (Fader 0%) MATricks Preset: Choose the MATricks preset, the plugin will only update XGroup information so you can have other information in the preset. StepSize: The amount that you want the plugin to step, if set to 1 it will go from every rounded value between low value and high value, if 2, it will step by 2, etc. 3 - Keep Plugin running. 4 - A better version of this plugin is on the way, with settings stored in memory and more customization options.
UserPlugin.Author: LXTater.com
